allow: PowerShell($h = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/health"; Write-Output "health: $\($h.status\)"; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@pharmacy.local","password":"Admin@123"}'; Write-Output "login user: $\($login.user.name\) role=$\($login.user.role\)"; $token=$login.accessToken; $dash = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/dashboard" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Output "dash lowStock=$\($dash.data.lowStockCount\) expiring=$\($dash.data.expiringSoonCount\) expired=$\($dash.data.expiredCount\)"; $meds = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/medicines?limit=3" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Output "medicines total: $\($meds.pagination.total\)")

PowerShell(try { Resolve-DnsName -Type TXT -Name cluster0.4uoluap.mongodb.net -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Strings } catch { Write-Output "TXT FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "CLIENT HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) | title present: $\($r.Content -match '<title'\)" } catch { Write-Output "CLIENT FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
